comments.author: @henry_lawcc
comments.text:
As a Hong Konger, I can wholeheartedly NOT recommend anyone to visit HK that's overpriced, crowded and filled with extremely rude staffs everywhere (who are mostly 'new HKers' btw). Even us native HKers go to mainland China / Thailand / Japan for the weekends because you get much more for the same amount of money. 

Unless there are some places / events in HK you really wanna visit, I'd encourage you to look elsewhere or be prepared of disappointments.
